name: Aero
description: Swift as the wind and deadly as lightning, Aero fighters strike with blinding speed and vanish before retaliation. They command the storm itself, channeling electricity through their attacks and outmaneuvering any foe.
lore: Children of the eternal tempest, the Aero bloodline dances between raindrops and rides the lightning. They are messengers of the sky gods, delivering judgment with thunderous fury. No cage can hold them, no enemy can catch them.

passive_ability.name: Tempo Surge
passive_ability.description: You move 25% faster at all times and your native Hytale energy bar is increased by 80%.

recommended_for: Players who enjoy high mobility, hit-and-run tactics, and explosive damage windows.
